name: HATHOR-AGE-002 pass — agent emits 'DTP' which normalises to 'DPT' and is in scope
description: Pertussis acronym-order variance ('DTP' vs 'DPT') stabilised by _normalize_pertussis at the rule layer. Without normalisation, 'DTP' would not appear in PHASE1_ANTIGENS and AGE-002 would fail.

recommendations.reasoning: Agent emitted 'DTP'; engine normalises to canonical 'DPT'.
